mission.title: argo-workflows: Add taskname to the workflow pod's name
mission.description: Add taskname to the workflow pod's name. Requested by 33+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo-workflows deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-workflows version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
helm list -n argo-workflows 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-workflows installation.

steps.title: Review argo-workflows configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows
```
Currently, workflow pods get random hashed names that make it hard to identify which task a pod is running. Adding the task name to the pod name makes tracking and debugging much easier.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add taskname to the workflow pod's name
steps.description:
Enable task name inclusion in pod names. After this change, pod names include the task name for easier identification:
```bash
# Before: pods have random hashed names
# wf-install-1938236639
# After: pods include the task name
# wf-install-db-init-3464818
# wf-install-setup-host-3672310916
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l workflows.argoproj.io/workflow
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add taskname to the workflow pod's name" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Added the task name to the workflow pod name, making it easier to identify which pod is performing which task. Pod names now follow the pattern: workflow-name-task-name-hash.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible.
